calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Apr-14-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on Petitioner Patricia Jacqueline Farfan's Request to change her minor daughter's name from Jasmine Jacqueline Cornejo Farfan to Jasmine Jacqueline Farfan.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:40 a.m.

Jeffrey C. Tsu, Esq. appeared with petitioner Patricia Jacqueline Farfan and the minor Jasmine Jacqueline Cornejo Farfan, who were placed under oath and testified.
Jose Manuel Cornejo, the minor's father and objecting party, was placed under oath and testified.
Both petitioner Patricia Jacqueline Farfan and her daughter Jasmine Jacqueline Cornejo Farfan, along with Messrs. Tsku and Cornejo, appeared via ZOOM for today's hearing.
Proof of Publication on file.
Mr. Cornejo filed his objection to the proposed name change on March 28, 2022.
Petitioner's Declaration in Support of the proposed Name Change was e-filed with the Clerk's Office on April 13, 2022, but a Courtesy Copy was not provided to the Court prior to the commencement of this morning's proceedings.

The Court hears testimony, has reviewed all the evidence, and after hearing the testimony of the parties, and reviewing the evidence presented, petitioner Patricia Jacqueline Farfan's request to change her minor daughter's name from Jasmine Jacqueline Cornejo Farfan to Jasmine Jacqueline Farfan is DENIED With Prejudice.

Proceedings concluded at 11:05 a.m.
